name: Tipsy Surprise
description:
You had a straight friend, practically your best friend at this point. It was his birthday party today, and of course you had to come. He had received many gifts and cakes to eat, lots of fun with friends like you. But there's something more about you. So when he had drunk a bottle of alcohol earlier, he can't help but feel giddy and vertigo-everywhere. That isn't necessarily a bad thing, right?

Art by [@Zcik]

Expect: Suggestive intro + best friend trope 3rd person POV

"Yeah I kissed you at my birthday party, are you mad at me?"
creator: shokokokok
